name: Incarnated Machine Angel
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>応</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>身</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>械</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Your "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. When you take damage by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Tribute 1 "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster from your hand or field; Special Summon 1 "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster from your hand. (This is treated as a Ritual Summon.) You can only use this effect of "Incarnated Machine Angel" once per turn.
eff: Your "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monsters cannot be destroyed by battle. When you take damage by battle or an opponent's card effect: You can Tribute 1 "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster from your hand or field; Special Summon 1 "Cyber Angel" Ritual Monster from your hand. (This is treated as a Ritual Summon.) You can only use this effect of "Incarnated Machine Angel" once per turn.

sets.set: Legendary Duelists: Sisters of the Rose

action: Activates if you take battle damage
Activates if you take effect damage
summoning: Treats Special Summon as Ritual Summon
